OIC). - Fähigkeit, konsolidierte Bilanzen, GuV und Cash‑Flow‑Statements zu designen und zu validieren. - Tiefes Verständnis von Intercompany‑Eliminierungen, Währungsumrechnung und CTA, Eigenkapital‑Reconciliation, Minderheitsanteilen, Journalen und Anpassungen, Audit‑ und Reconciliation‑Prozessen. - Starke analytische und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten. - Exzellente Stakeholder‑Management‑ und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Fließend Englisch (weitere europäische Sprachen von Vorteil). - Reisebereitschaft je nach Kunden‑Engagements. ## Bevorzugte Qualifikationen - Hands‑on‑Erfahrung mit Board GCR. - Vorherige Erfahrung bei einer Big‑Four‑Firma oder einer Finance‑Transformation‑Beratung. - Offizielle CPM‑Plattform‑Zertifizierungen. - Kenntnis von IFRS 16 (Leasing‑Accounting). - Vertrautheit mit ESG‑Reporting‑Frameworks. - Erfahrung mit XBRL/ESEF‑Regulierungs‑Reporting‑Anforderungen. ## Arbeitsmodell - Standort: Chiasso HQ (Schweiz). - Hybrides Arbeitsmodell gemäß Unternehmensrichtlinie verfügbar. - Gelegentliche internationale Reisen je nach Projektbedarf. ## Was wir bieten - Möglichkeit, mit führenden globalen Organisationen zu arbeiten. - Einblick in komplexe, hochwirksame Finanz‑Transformationsprojekte. - Ein kollaboratives und internationales Umfeld. - Professionelles Wachstum in einem schnell wachsenden, innovativen Technologieunternehmen. ## Unser Engagement für Diversity und Inclusion Treten Sie einem Unternehmen bei, das den Mehrwert von Vielfalt, Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit glaubt. Wir fördern ein Arbeitsumfeld, in dem alle Menschen respektiert und für die Aspekte, die sie einzigartig machen, geschätzt werden. Wir stellen Sie wegen Ihrer Person ein und möchten, dass Sie Ihr wahres Ich jeden Tag zur Arbeit bringen! Board International ist ein Arbeitgeber, der Chancengleichheit bietet und sich zu einer diversen und inklusiven Belegschaft verpflichtet. Ihre personenbezogenen Daten werden so lange gespeichert, wie es zur Bearbeitung Ihrer Bewerbung und zur Erbringung der angeforderten Dienstleistung erforderlich ist. Ihre Daten können zudem zur Erfüllung gesetzlicher Pflichten verarbeitet werden. In jedem Fall werden die Daten ohne unangemessene Verzögerung gelöscht, sobald die genannten gesetzlichen Pflichten erfüllt sind. Ihre Daten werden von Board International SA und/oder deren Tochtergesellschaften in der EU oder außerhalb auf Basis der im europäischen Datenschutz‑Reglement 2016/679 vorgesehenen geeigneten Garantien verarbeitet. Sie können jederzeit Zugang, Berichtigung und/oder Löschung Ihrer personenbezogenen Daten, die von Board International SA oder deren Tochtergesellschaften für Rekrutierungszwecke verwendet werden, verlangen. Für weitere Fragen verweisen wir auf unsere unter https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy
descriptions.fr: Chez Board, nous fournissons des solutions de planification financière et opérationnelle pour les meilleures marques du monde. Des milliers d’entreprises utilisent notre technologie pour optimiser les ressources, stimuler la croissance et garantir la rentabilité. Grâce à l’analytique avancée, aux prévisions et aux insights pilotés par l’IA, les clients transforment des données complexes et en temps réel en informations exploitables. Quel a été le facteur clé de notre succès ? Nos personnes – nous valorisons la perspective unique et l’énergie que chacun apporte à l’organisation. Nous collaborons ouvertement entre équipes et frontières. Nous adoptons un état d’esprit de croissance pour obtenir des résultats. Et nous célébrons le succès partagé lorsque les objectifs et les jalons sont atteints. Prêt à rejoindre une équipe où l’innovation rencontre la collaboration ? Si vous êtes animé par des idées audacieuses et une mentalité centrée sur le client, votre prochaine aventure commence ici ! Nous recherchons un ## Consultant Senior Consolidation Financière pour rejoindre notre Professional Services Center of Excellence ( ## CoE ) à notre ## Siège de Chiasso . Dans ce rôle, vous dirigerez et livrerez des projets complexes de consolidation financière pour des clients d’entreprise, les aidant à concevoir et mettre en œuvre des solutions modernes et évolutives de consolidation et de reporting en utilisant la technologie Board. En tant que membre senior de l’équipe, vous combinerez une expertise fonctionnelle approfondie en consolidation de groupe (IFRS/GAAP local, éliminations inter‑entreprises, traduction de devises, reporting légal) avec de fortes capacités de conseil. Vous agirez en tant que conseiller de confiance, guiderez les meilleures pratiques et contribuerez à l’évolution de notre Financial Consolidation CoE. Vous rendrez compte directement au CoE Director et collaborerez étroitement avec les équipes Product, Customer Success, Support et les autres équipes de conseil à travers les régions. ## Responsabilités clés : ### Supervision & Implémentation du CoE - Contribuer au Global Consolidation & Reporting (GCR) Center of Excellence en promouvant les standards, la gouvernance de livraison et les meilleures pratiques. - Examiner et valider les livrables clés d’implémentation (modèle de données, règles de consolidation, mappings, packs de tests, runbooks et supports de formation). - Soutenir la configuration et la validation des processus de consolidation incluant : - Définition du périmètre de consolidation - Structures de propriété et participations minoritaires - Éliminations inter‑entreprises - Traduction de devises et CTA - Journaux et ajustements - Traçabilité d’audit, contrôles et reporting - Apporter un soutien pratique pendant les phases critiques du projet (UAT, mise en production, premier cycle de clôture). - Piloter les activités de réconciliation et la résolution des écarts pendant les phases de stabilisation. - Développer et maintenir des actifs réutilisables du CoE (templates, check‑lists, scripts de test standards et playbooks). - Former et coacher les équipes de delivery et les partenaires sur les standards de consolidation et les meilleures pratiques de la solution. ### Support & Résolution de Tickets - Trier et résoudre les tickets de support fonctionnel L2/L3 relatifs à : - Chargements de données et intégrations - Règles de configuration et de calcul - Sécurité et workflow - Reporting et réconciliation - Effectuer des analyses structurées des causes racines et mettre en œuvre des correctifs durables. - Communiquer clairement et de façon proactive avec les parties prenantes concernant la résolution des incidents. - Escalader les défauts produit à l’ingénierie et valider les correctifs. - Documenter les solutions dans des articles de base de connaissances et des guides de dépannage afin d’améliorer l’évolutivité et de réduire les problèmes récurrents. ## Compétences et qualifications requises - Diplôme de licence ou master en finance, comptabilité, administration des affaires ou domaine similaire. - 3 à 5 ans d’expérience en conseil de consolidation financière ou dans des rôles de consolidation de groupe d’entreprise. - Expérience dans la mise en œuvre de solutions logicielles EPM/CPM/consolidation. - Familiarité avec les IFRS et/ou les GAAP locaux (ex. OIC). - Capacité à concevoir et valider les bilans consolidés, comptes de résultat et tableaux de flux de trésorerie. - Solide compréhension des éliminations inter‑entreprises, de la traduction de devises et du CTA, de la réconciliation des capitaux propres et des participations minoritaires, des écritures et ajustements, de l’auditabilité et du processus de réconciliation. - Fortes compétences analytiques et de résolution de problèmes. - Excellentes compétences en gestion des parties prenantes et en communication. - Maîtrise de l’anglais (d’autres langues européennes sont un plus). - Disponibilité à voyager selon les besoins des missions client. ## Qualifications préférées - Expérience pratique avec Board GCR. - Expérience antérieure dans un cabinet Big Four ou une société de conseil en transformation financière. - Certifications officielles sur la plateforme CPM. - Connaissance d’IFRS 16 (comptabilité des locations). - Familiarité avec les cadres de reporting ESG. - Exposition aux exigences de reporting réglementaire XBRL/ESEF. ## Modèle de travail - Lieu : Siège de Chiasso (Suisse). - Modèle de travail hybride disponible conformément à la politique de l’entreprise. - Voyages internationaux occasionnels selon les besoins du projet. ## Ce que nous offrons - Opportunité de travailler avec des organisations mondiales de premier plan. - Exposition à des projets de transformation financière complexes et à fort impact. - Un environnement collaboratif et international. - Développement professionnel au sein d’une entreprise technologique en forte croissance et innovante. ## Notre engagement en faveur de la diversité et de l’inclusion Rejoignez une entreprise qui croit à la valeur ajoutée de la diversité, de l’inclusion et du sentiment d’appartenance. Nous favorisons un environnement de travail où chaque personne est respectée et valorisée pour les aspects qui la rendent unique. Nous vous recrutons pour ce que vous êtes, et nous souhaitons que vous apportiez votre vrai moi au travail chaque jour ! Board International est un employeur garantissant l’égalité des chances et s’engage à une main‑d’œuvre diversifiée et inclusive. Vos données personnelles seront conservées aussi longtemps que nécessaire au traitement des candidatures que vous avez soumises et à la prestation du service demandé. Vos données personnelles peuvent également être traitées pour le respect des obligations légales. Dans tous les cas, elles seront supprimées sans retard injustifié dès que les obligations légales seront remplies. Vos données sont collectées et utilisées par Board International SA et/ou ses filiales situées dans l’UE ou à l’extérieur, sur la base des garanties appropriées prévues par le Règlement européen 2016/679. Vous pouvez à tout moment demander l’accès, la correction et/ou la suppression de vos données personnelles utilisées par Board International SA ou ses filiales à des fins de recrutement. Pour toute question supplémentaire, veuillez consulter notre Politique de confidentialité à l’adresse https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

descriptions.it: Noi di Board forniamo soluzioni di pianificazione finanziaria e operativa per i migliori marchi del mondo. Migliaia di aziende utilizzano la nostra tecnologia per ottimizzare le risorse, favorire la crescita e garantire la redditività. Grazie ad analisi e previsioni avanzate, oltre a insight basati sull'intelligenza artificiale, i clienti trasformano dati complessi in tempo reale in informazioni fruibili. Qual è stata la chiave del nostro successo? Le nostre persone: apprezziamo la prospettiva unica di ognuno e l'energia che apportano all'organizzazione. Collaboriamo apertamente tra team e confini. Abbracciamo una mentalità di crescita per ottenere risultati. E celebriamo il successo condiviso man mano che vengono raggiunti obiettivi e traguardi. Sei pronto a unirti a un team in cui l'innovazione incontra la collaborazione? Se sei guidato da idee audaci e da una mentalità incentrata sul cliente, la tua prossima avventura inizia qui! Stiamo attualmente cercando un ingegnere informatico attento ai dettagli ed esperto di tecnologia da inserire nel team di ricerca e sviluppo nel nostro ufficio di Chiasso. Riportando al Tech Lead, contribuirai attivamente al ciclo di vita dello sviluppo del software, lavorando a stretto contatto con altri sviluppatori e product manager qualificati. Mansioni principali: - Gestire lo sviluppo del software, la valutazione e la definizione di funzionalità specifiche, progettazione e codifica dei componenti - Tradurre i requisiti in specifiche tecniche per lo sviluppo del software - Partecipare alla stesura della struttura e della progettazione applicativa del sistema - Produrre codice pulito ed efficiente basato sulle specifiche - Raccomandare e avviare miglioramenti - Risolvere problemi, eseguire il debug e aggiornare il software esistente - Creare documentazione tecnica per riferimento e reporting Cosa cerchiamo: - Background accademico in informatica, ingegneria informatica o equivalente - Conoscenza operativa di Angular/AngularJs, TypeScript, HTML e CSS - Precedente esposizione a test di unità/integrazione - È preferibile la conoscenza di Microsoft ASP.NET 4.8/Core, C#, Web API 2 e i principi SOLID - L'esperienza con Azure Cloud, Kubernetes/Docker sarà considerata un vantaggio - Approccio sistematico e un occhio attento ai dettagli - Attitudine naturale al lavoro di squadra e all'apprendimento continuo - Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese Il nostro impegno per la diversità e l'inclusione Entra a far parte di un'azienda che crede nel valore aggiunto della diversità, dell'inclusione e dell'appartenenza. Promuoviamo un ambiente di lavoro in cui tutte le persone sono rispettate e valorizzate, per tutti gli aspetti che le rendono uniche. Ti assumiamo per quello che sei e vogliamo che tu porti il ​​tuo vero sé al lavoro ogni giorno! Board International è un datore di lavoro che garantisce pari opportunità e si impegna a garantire una forza lavoro diversificata e inclusiva. I tuoi dati personali saranno conservati per il tempo necessario all'evasione delle candidature lavorative da te presentate e alla fornitura del servizio da te richiesto. I Suoi dati personali potranno essere trattati anche per l'adempimento degli obblighi previsti dalla legge. descriptions.en: At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved.Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here! We are currently looking for a detail-oriented, tech savvy Software Engineer to join the R&D team in our Chiasso office. Reporting to the Tech Lead, you will actively contribute to the software development life cycle, working closely with other qualified Developers and Product Managers. Main duties: - Handle software development, evaluation and definition of specific functionalities, design and coding of components - Translate requirements into technical specifications for software development - Participate in the drafting of the structure and application design of the system - Produce clean, efficient code based on specifications - Recommend and initiate improvements - Troubleshoot, debug and upgrade existing software - Create technical documentation for reference and reporting What we look for: - Academic background in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or equivalent - Working knowledge of Angular/AngularJs, TypeScript, HTML & CSS - Previous exposure to unit/integration testing - Knowledge of Microsoft ASP.NET 4.8/Core, C#, Web API 2 and SOLID principles is preferable - Experience with Azure Cloud, Kubernetes/Docker will be considered a plus - Systematic approach and a keen eye for detail - Natural aptitude to teamwork and continuous learning - Fluency in English Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion Join a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day! Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes. For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy
descriptions.de: Bei Board unterstützen wir Finanz- und Betriebsplanungslösungen für die besten Marken der Welt. Tausende Unternehmen nutzen unsere Technologie, um Ressourcen zu optimieren, Wachstum voranzutreiben und Rentabilität sicherzustellen. Mit fortschrittlichen Analysen und Prognosen sowie KI-gestützten Erkenntnissen verwandeln Kunden komplexe Echtzeitdaten in umsetzbare Informationen. Was war der Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg? Unsere Mitarbeiter – wir schätzen die einzigartige Perspektive und Energie, die jeder in die Organisation einbringt. Wir arbeiten offen über Teams und Grenzen hinweg zusammen. Wir verfolgen eine Wachstumsmentalität, um Ergebnisse zu erzielen. Und wir feiern den gemeinsamen Erfolg, wenn Ziele und Meilensteine ​​erreicht werden. Sind Sie bereit, einem Team beizutreten, in dem Innovation auf Zusammenarbeit trifft? Wenn Sie von mutigen Ideen und einer kundenorientierten Mentalität angetrieben werden, beginnt Ihr nächstes Abenteuer hier! Wir sind derzeit auf der Suche nach einem detailorientierten, technisch versierten Softwareentwickler zur Verstärkung des Forschungs- und Entwicklungsteams in unserem Büro in Chiasso. Sie sind dem technischen Leiter unterstellt und tragen aktiv zum Lebenszyklus der Softwareentwicklung bei, indem Sie eng mit anderen qualifizierten Entwicklern und Produktmanagern zusammenarbeiten. Hauptaufgaben: - Softwareentwicklung, Evaluierung und Definition spezifischer Funktionalitäten, Design und Codierung von Komponenten übernehmen - Anforderungen in technische Spezifikationen für die Softwareentwicklung umsetzen - An der Ausarbeitung der Struktur und des Anwendungsdesigns des Systems mitwirken - Sauberen, effizienten Code auf der Grundlage von Spezifikationen erstellen - Verbesserungen empfehlen und einleiten - Fehlerbehebung, Fehlerbehebung und Aktualisierung bestehender Software - Technische Dokumentation als Referenz und Berichterstattung erstellen Was wir suchen: - Akademischer Hintergrund in Informatik, Computertechnik oder gleichwertig - Praktische Kenntnisse in Angular/AngularJs, TypeScript, HTML & CSS - Vorherige Erfahrung mit Unit-/Integrationstests - Kenntnisse in Microsoft ASP.NET 4.8/Core, C#, Web API 2 und SOLID-Prinzipien sind wünschenswert - Erfahrung mit Azure Cloud, Kubernetes/Docker wird als Pluspunkt angesehen - Systematischer Ansatz und ein scharfes Auge für Details - Natürliche Begabung für Teamarbeit und kontinuierliches Lernen - Fließende Englischkenntnisse Unser Engagement für Vielfalt und Inklusion Treten Sie einem Unternehmen bei, das an den Mehrwert von Vielfalt, Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit glaubt. Wir fördern ein Arbeitsumfeld, in dem alle Menschen in allen Aspekten respektiert und geschätzt werden, die sie einzigartig machen. Wir stellen Sie so ein, wie Sie sind, und wir möchten, dass Sie jeden Tag Ihr wahres Selbst bei der Arbeit einbringen! Board International setzt sich als Arbeitgeber für Chancengleichheit ein und setzt sich für eine vielfältige und integrative Belegschaft ein. Ihre personenbezogenen Daten können auch zur Erfüllung der gesetzlich vorgesehenen Pflichten verarbeitet werden. Ihre Daten werden in jedem Fall unverzüglich gelöscht, wenn die vorgenannten gesetzlichen Verpflichtungen erfüllt sind. Ihre personenbezogenen Daten werden von Board International SA und/oder seinen Tochtergesellschaften mit Sitz in der EU oder außerhalb auf der Grundlage der geeigneten Garantien der Europäischen Verordnung 2016/679 erhoben und verwendet. descriptions.fr: Chez Board, nous proposons des solutions de planification financière et opérationnelle pour les meilleures marques du monde. Des milliers d'entreprises utilisent notre technologie pour optimiser leurs ressources, stimuler leur croissance et garantir leur rentabilité. Grâce à des analyses et des prévisions avancées, ainsi qu'à des informations basées sur l'IA, les clients transforment des données complexes en temps réel en informations exploitables. Quelle a été la clé de notre succès ? Nos collaborateurs : nous valorisons le point de vue unique de chacun et l’énergie qu’ils apportent à l’organisation. Nous collaborons ouvertement au-delà des équipes et des frontières. Nous adoptons un état d’esprit de croissance pour obtenir des résultats. Et nous célébrons le succès partagé à mesure que les objectifs et les jalons sont atteints. Prêt à rejoindre une équipe où l'innovation rencontre la collaboration ? Si vous êtes motivé par des idées audacieuses et une mentalité centrée sur le client, votre prochaine aventure commence ici ! Nous recherchons actuellement un ingénieur logiciel soucieux du détail et connaisseur en technologie pour rejoindre l'équipe R&D de notre bureau de Chiasso. Relevant du Tech Lead, vous contribuerez activement au cycle de vie du développement logiciel, en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec d'autres développeurs et chefs de produit qualifiés. Tâches principales : - Gérer le développement logiciel, l'évaluation et la définition de fonctionnalités spécifiques, la conception et le codage de composants - Traduire les exigences en spécifications techniques pour le développement logiciel - Participer à la rédaction de la structure et de la conception des applications du système - Produire un code propre et efficace basé sur les spécifications - Recommander et lancer des améliorations - Dépanner, déboguer et mettre à niveau les logiciels existants - Créer une documentation technique pour référence et reporting Ce que nous recherchons : - Formation académique en informatique, en génie informatique ou équivalent - Connaissance pratique d'Angular/AngularJs, TypeScript, HTML et CSS - Précédent exposition aux tests unitaires/d'intégration - La connaissance de Microsoft ASP.NET 4.8/Core, C#, Web API 2 et des principes SOLID est préférable - Une expérience avec Azure Cloud, Kubernetes/Docker sera considérée comme un plus - Approche systématique et sens aigu du détail - Aptitude naturelle au travail d'équipe et à l'apprentissage continu - Maîtrise de l'anglais Notre engagement envers la diversité et l'inclusion Rejoignez une entreprise qui croit en la valeur ajoutée de la diversité, de l'inclusion et de l'appartenance. Nous favorisons un environnement de travail dans lequel toutes les personnes sont respectées et valorisées, pour tous les aspects qui les rendent uniques. Nous vous embauchons pour qui vous êtes et nous voulons que vous vous mettiez au travail chaque jour ! Board International est un employeur garantissant l'égalité des chances et s'engage en faveur d'une main-d'œuvre diversifiée et inclusive. Vos données personnelles seront conservées aussi longtemps que nécessaire au traitement des candidatures que vous avez soumises et à la fourniture du service que vous avez demandé. Vos données personnelles pourront également être traitées pour le respect des obligations prévues par la loi. Vos données seront en tout cas supprimées sans retard injustifié une fois que les obligations légales susmentionnées auront été remplies. Vos données personnelles sont collectées et utilisées par Board International SA et/ou ses filiales situées dans l'UE ou en dehors sur la base des garanties appropriées fournies par le règlement européen 2016/679. Vous pouvez à tout moment demander à accéder, à rectifier et/ou supprimer vos données personnelles utilisées par Board International SA ou par ses filiales à des fins de recrutement. Pour toute autre question, veuillez vous référer à notre sur https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

descriptions.it: A Board, forniamo soluzioni di pianificazione finanziaria e operativa per i migliori marchi del mondo. Migliaia di imprese utilizzano la nostra tecnologia per ottimizzare le risorse, aumentare la crescita e garantire la redditività. Con analisi e previsioni avanzate, oltre a approfondimenti basati su AI, i clienti trasformano dati complessi e in tempo reale in intelligenza attuabile. Qual è stata la chiave del nostro successo? Il nostro popolo – apprezziamo la prospettiva e l’energia unica di tutti che portano all’organizzazione. Collaboriamo apertamente attraverso squadre e confini. Abbracciamo una mentalità di crescita per ottenere risultati. E celebriamo il successo condiviso come obiettivi e pietre miliari sono raggiunti. Pronto ad unirsi a un team in cui l'innovazione incontra la collaborazione? Se sei guidato da idee audaci e da una mentalità orientata al cliente, la tua prossima avventura inizia qui! Board sta assumendo un ## Solution Developer focalizzato sulla ## Operational Planning per creare soluzioni preconfigurate in ambiti operativi chiave, tra cui: - Merchandise Planning (ad esempio: Merchandise Financial Planning, Range & assortment, Allocation and Replenishment) - Supply Chain Planning (Inventory and Distribution Planning, S&OP, Demand Planning) Queste soluzioni sono fondamentali per la direzione strategica del prodotto di Board, offrendo ai clienti un punto di partenza strutturato costruito sugli standard del settore e blocchi di costruzione adattabili. Come ## Solution Developer , lavorerai accanto al Product Owner per trasformare la conoscenza del dominio in modelli scalabili che migliorano la velocità e il successo della consegna delle soluzioni. ## Responsabilità - Design applicazioni riutilizzabili per la pianificazione della domanda, ottimizzazione dell'inventario, pianificazione finanziaria della merce e altro ancora - Lavorare a stretto contatto con il proprietario del prodotto per priorizzare e modellare gli elementi backlog - Convertire i flussi di lavoro di pianificazione operativa in componenti modulari, facili da implementare - Sviluppare modelli di dati e logica aziendale allineati con scenari di pianificazione del mondo reale - Documentazione di supporto, collaudo e creazione di demo per uso interno - Eccellente collaborazione e capacità di problem solving - Fluency in English; altre lingue sono un plus Nice-to-Have: - Esperienza con la pianificazione in retail, CPG, o ambienti di produzione - Conoscenza dei metodi di analisi predittiva o di previsione statistica - Esperienza con la piattaforma Board è un plus ## Perché unirsi a noi Questo ruolo ti dà l'opportunità di modellare come le organizzazioni pianificano e operano. Fa parte di un team ad alto impatto che offre soluzioni pronte al mercato, leader del settore utilizzando la piattaforma di pianificazione intelligente di Board. Board International è un datore di lavoro pari opportunità e si impegna a una forza lavoro diversificata e inclusiva. I tuoi dati personali saranno conservati per tutto il tempo necessario per elaborare le domande di lavoro che hai presentato e per la fornitura del servizio richiesto. I Suoi dati personali possono anche essere trattati per l'adempimento degli obblighi previsti dalla legge. I tuoi dati verranno comunque cancellati senza ingiustificato ritardo una volta che i suddetti obblighi legali sono stati adempiuti. I Suoi dati personali sono raccolti e utilizzati da Board International SA e/o dalle sue controllate che si trovano nell'UE o al di fuori sulla base delle opportune salvaguardie previste dal Regolamento Europeo 2016/679. In qualsiasi momento potrà richiedere l'accesso, la rettifica e/o l'eliminazione dei suoi dati personali utilizzati da Board International SA o dalle sue controllate per scopi di reclutamento. Per ulteriori domande, consultare il sito https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence. What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved. Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here! Board is hiring a ## Solution Developer focused on ## Operational Planning to craft pre-configured solutions across key operational domains, including: - Merchandise Planning (e.g. Merchandise Financial Planning, Range & assortment, Allocation and Replenishment) - Supply Chain Planning (Inventory and Distribution Planning, S&OP, Demand Planning) These solutions are core to Board’s strategic product direction, offering customers a structured starting point built on industry standards and adaptable building blocks. As a ## Solution Developer , you’ll work alongside the Product Owner to transform domain knowledge into scalable templates that enhance the speed and success of solution delivery. ## Responsibilities - Design reusable applications for demand planning, inventory optimization, merchandise financial planning, and more - Work closely with the Product Owner to prioritize and shape backlog items - Convert operational planning workflows into modular, easy-to-implement components - Develop data models and business logic aligned with real-world planning scenarios - Support documentation, testing, and demo creation for internal and external use - Continuously improve solution features based on feedback from internal teams and early users ## Requirements Must-Have: - 2–4 years of experience designing and building planning applications, ideally within supply chain or merchandise planning - Familiarity with planning concepts such as demand forecasting, allocation, OTB, or replenishment - Hands-on experience with planning platforms (e.g. Board, Anaplan, SAP IBP, Blue Yonder, o9, etc.) - Strong skills in rule-based modeling, data workflows, UI/UX design for planning and data transformation/scripting. - Excellent collaboration and problem-solving abilities - Fluency in English; other languages are a plus Nice-to-Have: - Experience with planning in retail, CPG, or manufacturing environments - Knowledge of predictive analytics or statistical forecasting methods - Experience with the Board platform is a plus ## Why Join Us This role gives you the opportunity to shape how organizations plan and operate. Be part of a high-impact team that delivers market-ready, industry-leading solutions using Board’s intelligent planning platform. Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. descriptions.fr: Au conseil d'administration, nous avons des solutions de planification financière et opérationnelle pour les meilleures marques du monde. Des milliers d'entreprises utilisent notre technologie pour optimiser les ressources, stimuler la croissance et assurer la rentabilité. Grâce à l'analyse et à la prévision avancées, ainsi qu'à l'intelligence artificielle, les clients transforment des données complexes en temps réel en intelligence actionnable. Quelle est la clé de notre succès? Notre peuple, nous apprécions tout le monde, sa perspective et son énergie uniques qu'il apporte à l'organisation. Nous collaborons ouvertement entre les équipes et les frontières. Nous acceptons un état d'esprit de croissance pour obtenir des résultats. Et nous célébrons le succès commun à mesure que les objectifs et les jalons sont atteints. Prêt à rejoindre une équipe où l'innovation rencontre la collaboration? Si vous êtes animé par des idées audacieuses et une mentalité centrée sur le client, votre prochaine aventure commence ici ! Le Conseil recrute un développeur de solutions ## axé sur la planification opérationnelle ## pour concevoir des solutions préconfigurées dans les domaines opérationnels clés, notamment : - Planification des marchandises (p. ex. planification financière des marchandises, gamme et assortiment, affectation et reconstitution) - Planification de la chaîne d'approvisionnement (planification de l'inventaire et de la distribution, S et P, planification de la demande) Ces solutions sont au cœur de l'orientation stratégique du produit Board, offrant aux clients un point de départ structuré basé sur les normes de l'industrie et des éléments de construction adaptables. En tant que développeur de solutions ## , vous travaillerez avec le propriétaire du produit pour transformer les connaissances du domaine en modèles évolutives qui améliorent la vitesse et le succès de la livraison de solutions. ## Responsabilités - Concevoir des applications réutilisables pour la planification de la demande, l'optimisation des stocks, la planification financière des marchandises, etc. - Travailler en étroite collaboration avec le propriétaire du produit pour établir les priorités et façonner l'arriéré - Transformer les workflows de planification opérationnelle en composantes modulaires, faciles à mettre en oeuvre - Élaborer des modèles de données et une logique opérationnelle alignées sur les scénarios de planification du monde réel - Supporter la documentation, les essais et la création de démonstrations pour une utilisation interne et externe - Améliorer continuellement les fonctionnalités de la solution en fonction de la rétroaction des équipes internes et des premiers utilisateurs ## Besoins : - 2 à 4 ans d'expérience dans la conception et la construction d'applications de planification, idéalement dans la chaîne d'approvisionnement ou la planification des marchandises - Connaissance des concepts de planification tels que la prévision de la demande, l'allocation, la TBO ou la reconstitution - Expérience pratique des plates-formes de planification (p. ex. Board, Anaplan, SAP IBP, Blue Yonder, o9, etc.) - Fortes compétences dans la modélisation fondée sur les règles, les flux de données, la conception de l'UI/ - Excellente collaboration et capacité de résolution de problèmes - Fluence en anglais; d'autres langues sont un plus Nice-to-Have: - Expérience avec la planification dans les environnements de vente au détail, CPG ou de fabrication - Connaissance de l'analyse prédictive ou des méthodes de prévision statistique - L'expérience avec la plate-forme Board est un plus ## Pourquoi nous rejoindre Ce rôle vous donne l'occasion de façonner la façon dont les organisations planifient et fonctionnent. Faites partie d'une équipe à impact élevé qui offre des solutions de pointe pour le marché grâce à la plateforme de planification intelligente Board. Board International est un employeur sur un pied d'égalité et s'engage envers une main-d'oeuvre diversifiée et inclusive. Vos données personnelles seront stockées aussi longtemps qu'il est nécessaire de traiter les demandes d'emploi que vous avez soumises et pour la fourniture du service que vous avez demandé. Vos données personnelles peuvent également être traitées pour le respect des obligations prévues par la loi. Vos données personnelles sont collectées et utilisées par Board International SA et/ou ses filiales situées dans l'UE ou à l'extérieur sur la base des garanties appropriées prévues par le règlement européen 2016/679. À tout moment, vous pouvez demander à accéder, corriger et/ou supprimer vos données personnelles utilisées par Board International SA ou par ses filiales à des fins de recrutement. Pour toute autre question, veuillez consulter notre site https://www.board.com/fr/privacy-policy

descriptions.it: Board offre soluzioni di pianificazione finanziaria e operativa ai migliori marchi del mondo. Migliaia di aziende utilizzano la nostra tecnologia per ottimizzare le risorse, guidare la crescita e garantire la redditività. Grazie ad analisi e previsioni avanzate e a intuizioni guidate dall'intelligenza artificiale, i clienti trasformano dati complessi in tempo reale in informazioni utili. Qual è stata la chiave del nostro successo? Il nostro personale: apprezziamo il punto di vista unico di ognuno e l'energia che apporta all'organizzazione. Collaboriamo apertamente attraverso i team e i confini. Abbracciamo una mentalità di crescita per ottenere risultati. E celebriamo il successo condiviso quando vengono raggiunti obiettivi e traguardi. Siete pronti a unirvi a un team in cui l'innovazione incontra la collaborazione? Se siete animati da idee audaci e da una mentalità incentrata sul cliente, la vostra prossima avventura inizia qui! Siamo attualmente alla ricerca di un ## Senior Software Engineer, orientato ai dettagli e con una spiccata sensibilità tecnologica, da inserire nel team di ricerca e sviluppo della nostra sede di Chiasso. Riportando al Team Lead, contribuirai attivamente al ciclo di vita dello sviluppo software, lavorando a stretto contatto con altri sviluppatori qualificati e Product Manager. ## Principali mansioni: - Gestire lo sviluppo del software, la valutazione e la definizione di funzionalità specifiche, la progettazione e la codifica dei componenti - Tradurre i requisiti in specifiche tecniche per lo sviluppo del software - Partecipare alla stesura della struttura e del design applicativo del sistema - Produrre codice pulito ed efficiente sulla base delle specifiche - Raccomandare e avviare miglioramenti - Risolvere i problemi, eseguire il debug e aggiornare il software esistente - Creare documentazione tecnica di riferimento e di reporting ## Cosa cerchiamo: - Conoscenza di Angular/AngularJs, TypeScript, HTML e CSS - Precedente esposizione a test unitari/integrativi - Conoscenza di Microsoft ASP.NET 4.8/Core, C#, Web API 2 e principi SOLID è preferibile - L'esperienza con Azure Cloud, Kubernetes/Docker sarà considerata un plus - Approccio sistematico e occhio attento ai dettagli - Naturale attitudine al lavoro di squadra e all'apprendimento continuo - Fluidità in inglese ## Il nostro impegno per la diversità e l'inclusione Entrate a far parte di un'azienda che crede nel valore aggiunto della diversità, dell'inclusione e dell'appartenenza. Promuoviamo un ambiente di lavoro in cui tutte le persone sono rispettate e valorizzate, per tutti gli aspetti che le rendono uniche. Vi assumiamo per quello che siete e vogliamo che portiate il vostro vero io al lavoro ogni giorno! Board International è un datore di lavoro con pari opportunità e si impegna a creare una forza lavoro diversificata e inclusiva. I vostri dati personali saranno conservati per il tempo necessario a elaborare le candidature presentate e a fornire il servizio richiesto. I vostri dati personali potranno essere trattati anche per l'adempimento degli obblighi previsti dalla legge. In ogni caso, i vostri dati saranno cancellati senza ingiustificato ritardo una volta adempiuti i suddetti obblighi di legge. I vostri dati personali sono raccolti e utilizzati da Board International SA e/o dalle sue filiali che si trovano nell'Unione Europea o al di fuori di essa sulla base delle opportune garanzie previste dal Regolamento Europeo 2016/679. In qualsiasi momento potete chiedere di accedere, correggere e/o cancellare i vostri dati personali utilizzati da Board International SA o dalle sue filiali per scopi di reclutamento. Per ulteriori domande, si prega di consultare la nostra Informativa sulla privacy all'indirizzo https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy.
descriptions.en: At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence. What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved. Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here! We are currently looking for a detail-oriented, tech savvy ## Senior Software Engineer to join the R&D team in our Chiasso HQ. Reporting to the Team Lead, you will actively contribute to the software development life cycle, working closely with other qualified Developers and Product Managers. ## Main duties: - Handle software development, evaluation and definition of specific functionalities, design and coding of components - Translate requirements into technical specifications for software development - Participate in the drafting of the structure and application design of the system - Produce clean, efficient code based on specifications - Recommend and initiate improvements - Troubleshoot, debug and upgrade existing software - Create technical documentation for reference and reporting ## What we look for: - Academic background in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or equivalent - Working knowledge of Angular/AngularJs, TypeScript, HTML & CSS - Previous exposure to unit/integration testing - Knowledge of Microsoft ASP.NET 4.8/Core, C#, Web API 2 and SOLID principles is preferable - Experience with Azure Cloud, Kubernetes/Docker will be considered a plus - Systematic approach and a keen eye for detail - Natural aptitude to teamwork and continuous learning - Fluency in English ## Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion Join a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day! Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes. For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy
descriptions.de: Wir bei Board entwickeln Finanz- und Betriebsplanungslösungen für die besten Marken der Welt. Tausende von Unternehmen nutzen unsere Technologie, um Ressourcen zu optimieren, das Wachstum voranzutreiben und die Rentabilität zu sichern. Mit fortschrittlichen Analysen und Prognosen sowie KI-gesteuerten Erkenntnissen verwandeln unsere Kunden komplexe Echtzeitdaten in umsetzbare Informationen. Was ist der Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg? Unsere Mitarbeiter - wir schätzen die einzigartige Perspektive und die Energie, die sie in das Unternehmen einbringen. Wir arbeiten über Teams und Grenzen hinweg offen zusammen. Wir setzen auf eine wachstumsorientierte Denkweise, um Ergebnisse zu erzielen. Und wir feiern gemeinsame Erfolge, wenn Ziele und Meilensteine erreicht werden. Sind Sie bereit, in einem Team mitzuarbeiten, in dem Innovation auf Zusammenarbeit trifft? Wenn Sie von mutigen Ideen und einer kundenorientierten Mentalität angetrieben werden, beginnt Ihr nächstes Abenteuer hier! Wir sind auf der Suche nach einem detailorientierten, technisch versierten ## Senior Software Engineer, der das F&E-Team in unserem Hauptquartier in Chiasso verstärkt. Sie sind dem Teamleiter unterstellt und tragen aktiv zum Lebenszyklus der Softwareentwicklung bei, wobei Sie eng mit anderen qualifizierten Entwicklern und Produktmanagern zusammenarbeiten. ## Hauptaufgaben: - Software-Entwicklung, Evaluierung und Definition spezifischer Funktionalitäten, Design und Kodierung von Komponenten - Umsetzung von Anforderungen in technische Spezifikationen für die Software-Entwicklung - Beteiligung an der Ausarbeitung der Struktur und des Anwendungsdesigns des Systems - Erstellung eines sauberen, effizienten Codes auf der Grundlage der Spezifikationen - Empfehlung und Initiierung von Verbesserungen - Fehlerbehebung, Debugging und Upgrade bestehender Software - Erstellung technischer Dokumentation für Referenz- und Berichtszwecke ## Was wir suchen: - Akademischer Hintergrund in Informatik, Computertechnik oder gleichwertig - Kenntnisse in Angular/AngularJs, TypeScript, HTML & CSS - Frühere Erfahrungen mit Unit-/Integrationstests - Kenntnisse in Microsoft ASP.NET 4.8/Core, C#, Web API 2 und SOLID-Prinzipien sind von Vorteil - Erfahrungen mit Azure Cloud, Kubernetes/Docker sind von Vorteil - Systematischer Ansatz und ein scharfes Auge für Details - Natürliche Begabung für Teamarbeit und kontinuierliches Lernen - Fließende Englischkenntnisse ## Unser Engagement für Vielfalt und Inklusion Treten Sie einem Unternehmen bei, das an den Mehrwert von Vielfalt, Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit glaubt. Wir fördern ein Arbeitsumfeld, in dem alle Menschen respektiert und geschätzt werden, mit allen Aspekten, die sie einzigartig machen. Wir stellen Sie ein, weil Sie so sind, wie Sie sind, und wir möchten, dass Sie jeden Tag Ihr wahres Ich zur Arbeit mitbringen! Board International ist ein Arbeitgeber der Chancengleichheit und setzt sich für eine vielfältige und integrative Belegschaft ein. Ihre persönlichen Daten werden so lange gespeichert, wie es für die Bearbeitung der von Ihnen eingereichten Bewerbungen und für die Erbringung der von Ihnen angeforderten Dienstleistung erforderlich ist. Ihre personenbezogenen Daten können auch zur Erfüllung der gesetzlich vorgeschriebenen Verpflichtungen verarbeitet werden. Ihre Daten werden in jedem Fall ohne ungerechtfertigte Verzögerung gelöscht, sobald die oben genannten rechtlichen Verpflichtungen erfüllt sind. Ihre personenbezogenen Daten werden von Board International SA und/oder seinen Tochtergesellschaften, die sich in der EU oder außerhalb befinden, auf der Grundlage der angemessenen Garantien der Europäischen Verordnung 2016/679 erhoben und verwendet. Sie können jederzeit den Zugriff auf Ihre personenbezogenen Daten, die von Board International SA oder seinen Tochtergesellschaften zu Rekrutierungszwecken verwendet werden, sowie deren Korrektur und/oder Löschung verlangen. Für weitere Fragen lesen Sie bitte unsere Datenschutzrichtlinie unter https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy
descriptions.fr: Chez Board, nous développons des solutions de planification financière et opérationnelle pour les plus grandes marques du monde. Des milliers d'entreprises utilisent notre technologie pour optimiser les ressources, stimuler la croissance et assurer la rentabilité. Grâce à des analyses et des prévisions avancées, ainsi qu'à des informations basées sur l'IA, les clients transforment des données complexes en temps réel en informations exploitables. Qu'est-ce qui a été la clé de notre succès ? Nos collaborateurs - nous apprécions le point de vue unique de chacun et l'énergie qu'ils apportent à l'organisation. Nous collaborons ouvertement entre les équipes et au-delà des frontières. Nous adoptons un état d'esprit de croissance pour obtenir des résultats. Et nous célébrons les succès partagés lorsque les objectifs et les étapes sont atteints. Prêt à rejoindre une équipe où l'innovation rencontre la collaboration ? Si vous êtes animé par des idées audacieuses et une mentalité centrée sur le client, votre prochaine aventure commence ici ! Nous sommes actuellement à la recherche d'un ingénieur logiciel senior, soucieux du détail et doué pour la technologie, pour rejoindre l'équipe R&D à notre siège de Chiasso. Sous la responsabilité du chef d'équipe, vous contribuerez activement au cycle de vie du développement logiciel, en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec d'autres développeurs qualifiés et des chefs de produit. ## Principales tâches : - Vous serez en charge du développement du logiciel, de l'évaluation et de la définition des fonctionnalités spécifiques, de la conception et du codage des composants - Traduire les exigences en spécifications techniques pour le développement du logiciel - Participer à la rédaction de la structure et de la conception de l'application du système - Produire un code propre et efficace basé sur les spécifications - Recommander et initier des améliorations - Dépanner, déboguer et mettre à jour le logiciel existant - Créer une documentation technique pour la référence et le rapport ## Ce que nous recherchons : - Formation académique en informatique, ingénierie informatique ou équivalent - Connaissance pratique d'Angular/AngularJs, TypeScript, HTML & CSS - Exposition antérieure aux tests unitaires/intégration - Connaissance de Microsoft ASP.NET 4.8/Core, C#, Web API 2 et principes SOLID est préférable - Une expérience avec Azure Cloud, Kubernetes/Docker sera considérée comme un plus - Approche systématique et sens aigu du détail - Aptitude naturelle au travail en équipe et à l'apprentissage continu - Maîtrise de l'anglais ## Notre engagement en faveur de la diversité et de l'inclusion Rejoignez une entreprise qui croit en la valeur ajoutée de la diversité, de l'inclusion et de l'appartenance. Nous favorisons un environnement de travail dans lequel toutes les personnes sont respectées et valorisées, pour tous les aspects qui les rendent uniques. Nous vous engageons pour ce que vous êtes, et nous voulons que vous apportiez votre vraie personnalité au travail chaque jour ! Board International est un employeur qui souscrit au principe de l'égalité des chances et s'engage à ce que sa main-d'œuvre soit diversifiée et inclusive. Vos données personnelles seront conservées aussi longtemps que nécessaire pour traiter les candidatures que vous avez soumises et pour fournir le service que vous avez demandé. Vos données personnelles peuvent également être traitées pour l'accomplissement des obligations prévues par la loi. En tout état de cause, vos données seront supprimées sans délai injustifié une fois que les obligations légales susmentionnées auront été remplies. Vos données personnelles sont collectées et utilisées par Board International SA et/ou ses filiales qui sont situées dans l'UE ou en dehors sur la base des garanties appropriées prévues par le Règlement européen 2016/679. Vous pouvez à tout moment demander à accéder, à corriger et/ou à supprimer vos données personnelles utilisées par Board International SA ou par ses filiales à des fins de recrutement. Pour toute question complémentaire, veuillez consulter notre politique de confidentialité à l'adresse suivante : https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy.

descriptions.it: At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence. What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved. Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here! Role Overview We are seeking a Solution Developer, FP&A to build and enhance financial planning applications supporting budgeting, forecasting, and reporting. You will work closely with Product Owners to translate accounting requirements into reusable solution components that ensure compliance, accuracy, and performance. Key • Responsibilities - Develop planning models and workflows - Translate FP&A processes into scalable applications - Support testing, documentation, and demos - Build scalable workflows for multi-entity reporting and compliance - Support testing, validation, and audit-ready outputs - Contribute to documentation, demos, and solution assets - Collaborate with Product Owners to refine backlog and priorities Required Skills - 2–4+ years in FP&A or planning systems - Experience with planning tools (Board, Anaplan, Adaptive, etc.) - Strong analytical and modeling skills ## Why Join Us This role gives you the opportunity to shape how organizations plan and operate. Be part of a high-impact team that delivers market-ready, industry-leading solutions using Board’s intelligent planning platform. Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes. For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence. What’s been key to our success? Role Overview We are seeking a Solution Developer, Merchandise Planning to build retail planning applications supporting merchandising and inventory decisions. You will work closely with Product Owners to translate requirements into reusable solution components that ensure a robust technical framework as well as immediate business impact. Key • Responsibilities - Develop end-to-end solutions for buyers and merchandisers - Translate retail processes into system logic - Support testing, validation, and audit-ready outputs - Contribute to documentation, demos, and solution assets - Collaborate with Product Owners to refine backlog and priorities Required Skills - 2–4+ years in retail planning or solution development - Familiarity with merchandising processes - Experience with planning platforms ## Why Join Us This role gives you the opportunity to shape how organizations plan and operate. Key • Responsibilities - Develop end-to-end solutions for buyers and merchandisers - Translate retail processes into system logic - Support testing, validation, and audit-ready outputs - Contribute to documentation, demos, and solution assets - Collaborate with Product Owners to refine backlog and priorities Required Skills - 2–4+ years in retail planning or solution development - Familiarity with merchandising processes - Experience with planning platforms ## Why Join Us This role gives you the opportunity to shape how organizations plan and operate. Be part of a high-impact team that delivers market-ready, industry-leading solutions using Board’s intelligent planning platform. Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes. For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

descriptions.it: At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence. What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved. Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here! Role Overview We are looking for a highly skilled Product Owner – Integrated Business Planning (IBP) to drive the technical delivery of our integrated solutions. Working in close partnership with the Product Manager, you will play a critical role in translating product strategy into executable deliverables. While Product Managers define the vision, value proposition, and roadmap, you will ensure that this vision is technically feasible, well-structured, and effectively delivered. You will act as the bridge between business requirements and technology, breaking down complex planning needs into clear, actionable workstreams. You will also challenge assumptions when needed, ensuring that solutions are aligned with platform capabilities, architectural standards, and scalable design principles. This role requires strong organizational skills, technical acumen, and experience with enterprise planning platforms—ideally similar to Board. Key Responsibilities - Own and manage the product backlog, ensuring clarity, prioritization, and alignment with the product roadmap - Translate high-level product strategy into detailed user stories, workflows, and technical requirements - Assess and validate the technical feasibility of proposed solutions, challenging assumptions where necessary - Break down complex IBP use cases into structured development workstreams - Collaborate closely with Engineering teams to deliver high-quality, scalable solutions - Ensure alignment between design, architecture, and platform capabilities - Take ownership of the technical delivery and output quality of the development team - Validate end-to-end workflows, ensuring consistency, usability, and performance - Support cross-functional integration across: Financial Planning (FP&A) Commercial Planning Supply Chain Planning S&OP Workforce & Strategic Planning - Financial Planning (FP&A) - Commercial Planning - Supply Chain Planning - S&OP - Workforce & Strategic Planning - Contribute to solution design decisions, ensuring adherence to best practices and platform strengths - Support customer-facing activities, including implementations, demos, and solution validation - Stay up to date with trends in IBP, connected planning, and planning technologies Required Skills & Qualifications - 5+ years of experience as a Product Owner, Business Analyst, or similar role in enterprise software or planning solutions - Strong experience in Integrated Business Planning (IBP), S&OP or related domains - Proven ability to translate business requirements into technical specifications and deliverables - Experience working with planning platforms (e.g., Board, Anaplan, SAP IBP, Oracle, or similar) - Solid understanding of data models, workflows, and system design within planning solutions - Experience working in Agile development environments - Strong organizational and backlog management skills - Ability to challenge and refine product requirements based on technical constraints and best practices - Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills - Preferred Qualifications - Experience with Board platform or similar multidimensional planning technologies - Background in consulting, transformation programs, or enterprise implementations - Familiarity with enterprise-wide planning frameworks and architectures - Exposure to AI-driven planning, forecasting, or scenario modeling Why Join Us This role gives you the opportunity to shape how organizations plan and operate. Be part of a high-impact team that delivers market-ready, industry-leading solutions using Board’s intelligent planning platform. Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes. For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

descriptions.it: Company Overview: Board is the #1 decision-making platform. Founded in 1994 and Headquartered in Chiasso, Switzerland, Board International has enabled more than 3000 companies worldwide to effectively deploy Business Intelligence, Corporate Performance Management and Predictive Analytics applications on a single platform. The Board platform allows companies to achieve a single, accurate and complete view of business information and full control of performance across the entire organization. Founded in 1994, Board is a privately held company headquartered in Chiasso, Switzerland and Boston, USA, with 25 global offices on five continents. For our office in Zürich, we are seeking a dedicated, passionate Senior Account Manager who will be driving new business in Switzerland. Reporting to the RVP Sales/Country Manager, we are looking for a results-driven individual who will manage the full cycle for a defined vertical. • Responsibilities: - Increase sales of software licenses by independent acquisition of new customers - Manage and own the full sales cycle, including prospecting and qualification, contract negotiations, and closing business - Meet and exceed sales targets - Qualify and manage leads provided by the Marketing team to a successful closure - Building and maintaining a pipeline of high-quality opportunities by leveraging Marketing team, as well as through outbound territory development - Work effectively in a team environment to maximize revenue potential and ensure customer success - Manage and drive multiple simultaneous sales cycles effectively - Understand the functions, features and USPs of Board solution and be able to effectively communicate these to prospect and customers - Build and maintain strong customer relationships at Management and C-level, encourage the search of new potential partners and the support to the existing ones - Use Salesforce.com to manage sales processes and accurately forecast business Experience - 5+ years of experience in enterprise sales - Experience selling CPM, ERP, or BI software solutions - Ability to manage C-level relationship and Enterprise-level sales processes - Strong technical aptitude to learn the Board software and explain complex solutions - Knowledge of Accounting and/or Financial concepts - Familiarity with Budgeting, Planning, and Forecasting processes, Business Analytics, Data - Visualization, Data Management and Financial Reporting - Crossvertical, chemical and life science field experience favorable - A self-starter who works well within a strong team culture while independently managing his/her own work - Proven ability to meet and exceed a sales quota - Outstanding communication skills - BS/BA - Business fluent English and German are required, French would be favorable Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. descriptions.en: Company Overview: Board is the #1 decision-making platform. Founded in 1994 and Headquartered in Chiasso, Switzerland, Board International has enabled more than 3000 companies worldwide to effectively deploy Business Intelligence, Corporate Performance Management and Predictive Analytics applications on a single platform. The Board platform allows companies to achieve a single, accurate and complete view of business information and full control of performance across the entire organization. Founded in 1994, Board is a privately held company headquartered in Chiasso, Switzerland and Boston, USA, with 25 global offices on five continents. For our office in Zürich, we are seeking a dedicated, passionate Senior Account Manager who will be driving new business in Switzerland. Reporting to the RVP Sales/Country Manager, we are looking for a results-driven individual who will manage the full cycle for a defined vertical. • Responsibilities: - Increase sales of software licenses by independent acquisition of new customers - Manage and own the full sales cycle, including prospecting and qualification, contract negotiations, and closing business - Meet and exceed sales targets - Qualify and manage leads provided by the Marketing team to a successful closure - Building and maintaining a pipeline of high-quality opportunities by leveraging Marketing team, as well as through outbound territory development - Work effectively in a team environment to maximize revenue potential and ensure customer success - Manage and drive multiple simultaneous sales cycles effectively - Understand the functions, features and USPs of Board solution and be able to effectively communicate these to prospect and customers - Build and maintain strong customer relationships at Management and C-level, encourage the search of new potential partners and the support to the existing ones - Use Salesforce.com to manage sales processes and accurately forecast business Experience - 5+ years of experience in enterprise sales - Experience selling CPM, ERP, or BI software solutions - Ability to manage C-level relationship and Enterprise-level sales processes - Strong technical aptitude to learn the Board software and explain complex solutions - Knowledge of Accounting and/or Financial concepts - Familiarity with Budgeting, Planning, and Forecasting processes, Business Analytics, Data - Visualization, Data Management and Financial Reporting - Crossvertical, chemical and life science field experience favorable - A self-starter who works well within a strong team culture while independently managing his/her own work - Proven ability to meet and exceed a sales quota - Outstanding communication skills - BS/BA - Business fluent English and German are required, French would be favorable Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes. For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

descriptions.it: At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved.Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!We're seeking a bright, enthusiastic, and detail-oriented Associate Product Manager to join our dynamic Product Management team in Chiasso. This is an exciting opportunity for a motivated individual to contribute to the evolution of our cutting-edge unified platform. As an Associate Product Manager, you will work closely with experienced Product Managers, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success teams to understand market needs, define product requirements, and help bring innovative solutions to our customers. You will play a crucial role in shaping the future of our product and driving its success in the global market. • Responsibilities: - Market and User Research: Assist in conducting market research, analyzing industry trends, and gathering user feedback to identify opportunities and unmet needs. - • Requirements Gathering: Collaborate with stakeholders to understand their needs and translate them into clear and concise product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria. - Product Planning and Strategy: Support the Product Management team in defining the product vision, roadmap, and prioritization of features. - Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Engineering, UX/UI Design, Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success teams throughout the product development lifecycle to ensure successful product delivery and adoption. - Product Documentation: Assist in creating and maintaining product documentation, including user guides, release notes, and internal training materials. - Competitive Analysis: Monitor and analyze competitor products and activities to identify strengths, weaknesses, and opportunities for differentiation. - Performance Monitoring: Track and analyze product performance metrics to identify areas for improvement and inform future product decisions. - Product Evangelism: Support the communication of product value propositions and benefits to internal and external stakeholders. - Agile Participation: Actively participate in agile ceremonies, such as sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives. • Qualifications: - Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or a related field. - Previous experience in product management, business analysis, or a related role in the software industry. - Experience in CPM/EPM project implementations - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights. - Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English and Spanish. - An understanding of software development processes and agile methodologies. - Passion for technology and a keen interest in planning, budgeting, forecasting, and analytics solutions. - Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team. - Highly organized and detail-oriented with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously. - Familiarity with data analysis tools and techniques is a plus. Our commitment to Diversity and InclusionJoin a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day! Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes. For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy
